productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Diemos White Red Shoe
description: Designed for those aggresive runners, the puma Diemos has a great look and feels fabulous. Replete with ample impact protection features, this is the perfect running shoe for those who demand more than just style. Team it with performance clothing when on the run or at the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and t-shirts for a cool, casual look.Upper Synthetic upper with multiple overlays for durability and structure Perforations on the toe box and side panels, and a meshed tongue for breathability Lace-up system with a tongue loop for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue with an inner mesh and a padded mesh collar for snug, comfortable and well-ventilated fit Midsole PU midsole for maximum shock absorption, lightweight feel and durability Meshed and padded sockliner for fresh and dry all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPR footbed for durability Multi-directional outsole with hexagonal grooves on the medial side of the forefoot for maximum traction and grip Scooped midfoot for absolute cushioning and ergonomic comfort Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard for protection to the forefoot and to enhance shoe durability
